description: Implement ledger routing system, writer path governance, and next actor selection contract based on roadmap item 11. Create governance structures for automated ledger event routing and next actor determination.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed UNIVERSAL-EXECUTOR-AUDITOR-EXCHANGE-LEDGER-LOOP to next sequential item LEDGER-ROUTER-LEDGER-WRITER-NEXT-ACTOR-GOVERNANCE-CONTRACT
